terms.chf: Swiss franc — the currency used for formal-care cost-offset calculations in Caring Community deployments
terms.fadp: Federal Act on Data Protection — revised Swiss data protection law (in force since September 2023)
terms.ndsg: Neues Datenschutzgesetz — the revised Swiss Federal Data Protection Act (synonym for FADP)
terms.gdpr: General Data Protection Regulation — EU data protection law; Swiss deployments use FADP/nDSG instead
terms.sla: Service-level agreement — the maximum committed response or resolution time for each priority tier
terms.agpl: GNU Affero General Public License v3 — the open-source licence under which NEXUS is publicly released
terms.kpi: Key performance indicator — a measurable metric used to evaluate progress toward a defined goal
terms.roi: Return on investment — here: formal-care cost avoided per hour of informal support exchanged
terms.nexus: Project NEXUS — the multi-tenant timebanking and community-care platform
terms.xp: Experience points — gamification points awarded for completing exchanges and reaching milestones
terms.isco: International Standard Classification of Occupations — used to categorise care-service types
